purpose: Full delegation_ref fixture with complete authorization chain artifact: delegator, delegatee, capability, scope, policy_version, expires_at. Companion to delegation-ref-v1.fixture.json (which showed opaque envelope field). This fixture verifies the artifact derivation per docs/spec/delegation-ref.md.

vectors.description: giskard-self delegates payment.send capability to pioneer-agent-001 within scope mycelium:payment, under policy 2026-05-01, expiring 2026-05-27. This is the canonical authorization chain artifact for delegation-ref-v1.

invariants.delegation_ref_not_in_preimage: delegation_ref does not appear in action_preimage — action_ref determined solely by action_type, agent_id, scope, timestamp
invariants.scope_match: scope in delegation_artifact ('mycelium:payment') matches scope in action_preimage — conformant implementation SHOULD verify this
invariants.independent_hashes: delegation_ref = SHA-256(JCS(delegation_artifact)); action_ref = SHA-256(JCS(action_preimage)); neither derived from the other

notes.policy_version: Identifies the governing policy in force when this delegation was issued — not when the action is executed.
notes.expires_at: Part of the artifact and enters the hash. Checking currency is the integrator's responsibility — the delegation_ref itself does not expire.
